component.name: LaunchTask
component.script:
sub Init() m.top.functionName = "doLaunch" end sub
sub doLaunch() Sleep(50) url = m.top.launchUrl if url = "" or url = invalid then return
transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") transfer.SetUrl(url) port = CreateObject("roMessagePort") transfer.SetMessagePort(port) if transfer.AsyncPostFromString("") Wait(5000, port) end if end sub
